description: Here we introduce you to our cotton polyester girls frilly knickers with lots of pretty frills. With lace and bow these pretty summer frilly pants are here to match the perfect summer outfits for your baby girl. Also check out our matching 'Lace and Bow' hats to add style of your baby's summer clothing. Made of 65% Cotton, 35% Polyester, Lace & Bow: 100% Polyester.
